name: quillshield-security-skills
description: QuillShield smart contract security auditing skills for AI agents. Comprehensive coverage of OWASP Smart Contract Top 10 plus proxy/upgrade, signature replay, and token integration vulnerabilities.

plugins.name: behavioral-state-analysis
plugins.description: Multi-dimensional smart contract security auditing using Behavioral State Analysis (BSA). Combines behavioral intent extraction, parallel threat engines, adversarial simulation, and Bayesian confidence scoring.

plugins.name: semantic-guard-analysis
plugins.description: Detects logic vulnerabilities by analyzing guard-state consistency patterns. Finds functions that bypass security checks established by the contract's own patterns.

plugins.name: state-invariant-detection
plugins.description: Detects broken mathematical relationships between state variables. Infers invariants then finds functions that violate them — catches unauthorized minting, broken tokenomics, and accounting desynchronization.

plugins.name: reentrancy-pattern-analysis
plugins.description: Systematic detection of all reentrancy variants — classic, cross-function, cross-contract, and read-only reentrancy. Verifies CEI pattern compliance and detects callback-based attack vectors.

plugins.name: oracle-flashloan-analysis
plugins.description: Detects price oracle manipulation and flash loan attack vectors in DeFi smart contracts. Classifies oracle trust models, identifies stale price risks, and flash loan atomicity exploitation patterns.

plugins.name: proxy-upgrade-safety
plugins.description: Detects vulnerabilities in upgradeable proxy contracts — storage collisions, uninitialized implementations, selector clashing, and upgrade path safety. Covers Transparent, UUPS, Beacon, and Diamond patterns.

plugins.name: input-arithmetic-safety
plugins.description: Detects input validation failures and arithmetic vulnerabilities — precision loss, rounding exploitation, ERC4626 inflation attacks, unsafe casting, and Solidity 0.8+ unchecked block edge cases.

plugins.name: external-call-safety
plugins.description: Detects unsafe external call patterns and token integration vulnerabilities — unchecked returns, fee-on-transfer tokens, rebasing tokens, ERC-777 callbacks, and return data bombs.

plugins.name: signature-replay-analysis
plugins.description: Detects signature replay vulnerabilities — same-chain, cross-chain, and cross-contract replay attacks, EIP-712 verification, nonce management, and meta-transaction security.

plugins.name: dos-griefing-analysis
plugins.description: Detects DoS and griefing vulnerabilities — unbounded loops, gas limit exhaustion, external call failure DoS, 63/64 rule griefing, storage bloat, and push vs pull payment patterns.
